Instruction: Create the playlist "Fun with Kids" on Media Player and add Task ID 76.mp3 in Documents > Task 76 folder to the playlist.
Task Start State: Home screen with all applications closed except for the recording software.
(Old Task Start State): Apple Music (other music streaming platform) "home" screen is seen with nothing in the search bar and no results are shown
Task End State (for evaluating completio: A new playlist is created. Baby Shark song is added to the newly created playlist.
Resources we need: Baby Shark Mp3 song in VLC

Task: Adjust brightness on photo
Context: The default brightness setting of The Eiffel Tower photo is too high
Instruction: Open Task ID 77.jpg in Documents > Task 77 folder on Photos app. Turn down the brightness to -1.
Task Start State: Home screen with all applications closed except for the recording software.
(Old Task Start State): Eiffel Tower photo is open with the default brightness value
Task End State (for evaluating completio: The brightness on the photo of The Eiffel Tower reads -0.1
Resources we need: A photo of The Eiffel Tower downloaded and uploaded to the participants Photos

Task: Take snapshot from a video
Context: I want to share a snapshot of the food from the video I took yesterday in a restaurant I visited
Instruction: Open the video Task ID 81.mp4 in Documents > Task 81 folder and take a screenshot of the frame from the video with food in it.
Verified? (Y|N):
N --> VLC Media Player logs are not supported by Recorder. 
Y --> Logs are recorded from Windows Media Player. Log JSON file is not generated.
Task Start State: Home screen with all applications closed except for the recording software.
(Old Task Start State): The video is playing on VLC.
Task End State (for evaluating completio: The snapshot of the food is created.

Task: Change the language of the video
Context: I'm watching a YouTube video, but this video is in English and I want to improve my Spanish ability.
Instruction: Find "Click This Video To Feed 1 Person" by Mr Beast on YouTube. Change the audio track to Spanish instead.
Task Start State: Home screen with all applications closed except for the recording software.
(Old Task Start State): The video is playing in Chinese language.
Task End State (for evaluating completio: The video is playing in English.

Task: Change video quality
Context: I am watching a YouTube video but my network is slow and has an unstable stream
Instruction: Find "Click This Video To Feed 1 Person" by Mr Beast on YouTube. Change the video quality to 720p.
Task Start State: Home screen with all applications closed except for the recording software.
(Old Task Start State): The video is playing on Youtube with the recommended quality
Task End State (for evaluating completio: The video is playing in 720p.

Task: Enable Picture-in-Picture playback
Context: I want a video I am watching on YouTube to float in a small window while I look for other videos.
Instruction: Find "Click This Video To Feed 1 Person" by Mr Beast on YouTube. Enable picture-in-picture playback on Youtube.
